query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_profiles` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `preferredName` varchar(128),
  `profilePhotoUrl` text,
  `dateOfBirth` timestamp NULL,
  `personalEmail` varchar(320),
  `primaryPhone` varchar(32),
  `secondaryPhone` varchar(32),
  `timeZone` varchar(64),
  `addressLine1` varchar(255),
  `addressLine2` varchar(255),
  `city` varchar(128),
  `state` varchar(64),
  `zip` varchar(16),
  `country` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'US',
  `spouseName` varchar(255),
  `childrenNotes` text,
  `emergencyContactName` varchar(255),
  `emergencyContactPhone` varchar(32),
  `emergencyContactRelationship` varchar(128),
  `hobbies` text,
  `giftNotes` text,
  `shirtSize` varchar(16),
  `personalNotes` text,
  `employmentStatus` enum('active','inactive','on_leave','offboarded') DEFAULT 'active',
  `onboardedDate` timestamp NULL,
  `offboardedDate` timestamp NULL,
  `referredBy` varchar(255),
  `workAnniversaryDate` timestamp NULL,
  `internalNotes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_profiles` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `licenseNumber` varchar(64),
  `licenseState` varchar(32),
  `additionalLicenseStates` text,
  `licenseExpirationDate` timestamp NULL,
  `brokerageAffiliation` varchar(255),
  `bio` text,
  `instagramUrl` varchar(512),
  `facebookUrl` varchar(512),
  `linkedinUrl` varchar(512),
  `youtubeUrl` varchar(512),
  `tiktokUrl` varchar(512),
  `personalWebsiteUrl` varchar(512),
  `googleBusinessUrl` varchar(512),
  `agentStatus` enum('active','paused','recruiting','offboarded') DEFAULT 'active',
  `startDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `endDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `boardAssociation` varchar(255),
  `mlsId` varchar(64),
  `narId` varchar(64),
  `showingServiceLoginNotes` text,
  `transactionCoordinatorAssigned` varchar(255),
  `assistantAssigned` varchar(255),
  `personalBrandNotes` text,
  `specialInternalNotes` text,
  `birthdayRecognitionOptIn` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `anniversaryRecognitionOptIn` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `isa_profiles` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `isaStatus` enum('active','inactive','on_leave','offboarded') DEFAULT 'active',
  `startDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `endDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `managerId` int,
  `dialerUserId` varchar(128),
  `crmUserId` varchar(128),
  `slackHandle` varchar(128),
  `callRecordingLink` text,
  `trainingStartDate` timestamp NULL,
  `trainingCompletionDate` timestamp NULL,
  `currentTrainingStatus` varchar(128),
  `scriptVersionAssigned` varchar(64),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `admin_profiles` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `adminStatus` enum('active','inactive','on_leave','offboarded') DEFAULT 'active',
  `startDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `endDateWithSavvy` timestamp NULL,
  `managerId` int,
  `slackHandle` varchar(128),
  `adminType` enum('executive','operations','marketing','expansion','finance','other'),
  `primaryResponsibilityNotes` text,
  `backupResponsibilityNotes` text,
  `sopOwnerNotes` text,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

ALTER TABLE `user_documents` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `category` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'Other';
